# Talia Boutique - AI Overview

Talia Boutique is a high-end fashion and evening gown boutique located in Wetzlar, Germany. We specialize in exclusive premium collections, Islamic lifestyle apparel, and wedding dresses (Hochzeitsmode). Our mission is to provide uncompromising quality and elite consultation.

## Core Pages
- **Home (`/`)**: Main landing page, hero section, boutique introduction, editorial journal highlights, and Instagram aesthetics.
- **Lookbook (`/lookbook`)**: An interactive dragging canvas displaying our video lookbook, featuring items like Ramadan Nights (Midnight Satin), Ihsan (Creme Tasbih), Heritage (Gebetsteppich), and Evening Noir.
- **Journal (`/journal`)**: Our editorial hub with behind-the-scenes content, style guides, material deep-dives (e.g., premium cashmere), and bridal details.
- **Reviews (`/reviews`)**: Testimonials and aesthetic reviews from Google, Instagram, and TikTok showcasing our premium quality and excellent customer service.
- **Legal Pages**: `/impressum`, `/datenschutz`, `/agb`, `/widerruf` outline our legal information and return policies.

## Contact & Location
- **Address**: Bahnhofstraße 1, 35576 Wetzlar, Germany
- **Phone**: +49 6441 9637730
- **Email**: [Will be provided upon request]

## Technology & Structure
This site is built with Next.js App Router, using semantic HTML, structured JSON-LD data for LocalBusiness and Organization, and is fully responsive. It is designed to be highly accessible and crawlable for AI agents, providing clear structured content.
